creator: takashi@ueda.info.waseda.ac.jp
text:
in x11/gnome/gnomelibs/pkg/(COMMENT|DESCR),
"libaries" will be "libraries".

Fix: 

For more infomation about the Gnome on FreeBSD,
 please refer to ${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnome/pkg/DESCR.--tblRgWBnXGjyTzxBDq5rWHNw5WaPNLUgQ6nxmcK3KPLcx7kd
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- COMMENT.orig        Sun Jun 27 04:14:05 1999
+++ COMMENT     Sun Jul  9 23:53:54 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Libaries for GNOME, a GNU desktop environment
+Libraries for GNOME, a GNU desktop environment
